questions.question: Jesus said the Spirit of Truth would do what when he came?
What comparison did Jesus use to describe the disciples' grief turning to joy?
options: A seed growing into a tree

questions.question: Jesus said it was to the disciples' advantage that he go away, because otherwise the Counselor would not come.
In the world you have _____, but cheer up! I have overcome the world.
A little while, and you will not see me. Again a little while, and you will _____ me.
